title: Stored XSS in Alibaba and Aliexpress
excerpt: Discovered a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability affecting both Alibaba and Aliexpress platforms.

title: Facebook - Unrestricted File Upload and LFI
excerpt: Found unrestricted file upload and local file inclusion vulnerabilities in Facebook's infrastructure.

title: OK.ru UI Spoofing
excerpt: Identified a UI spoofing vulnerability in OK.ru that could mislead users.

title: Apple Website UI Spoofing
excerpt: Discovered a UI spoofing issue on Apple's website that could be exploited for phishing.
